content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible bending right, and the car appears well-centered heading into the right curve.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 22, target = (22 + 5) % 121 = 27
- Target waypoint 27: (7.0100, 1.0258)
- Car: x=6.2422, y=0.6766, heading=5.269°
- dy = 1.0258 - 0.6766 = 0.3492
- dx = 7.0100 - 6.2422 = 0.7678
- bearing = atan2(0.3492, 0.7678) = 24.44°
- delta = 24.44° - 5.269° = 19.17°
- |delta| ≈ 19° → moderate left, use 15° steering at speed 1.5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead but target waypoint 27 is still to the left of current heading (delta=+19.2°), so maintain 15° positive steering to follow the waypoint line into the right bend.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight heading due east (~0-5° heading)",
    "Sharp right curve begins around waypoints 26-32 (x=6.9-7.3, y=0.9-1.7)",
    "After the right curve, track goes west around y=2.7-4.5 then loops back south",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "On straights with |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Car is nearly centered (0.013m from center) — good position",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on straights; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "Need to prepare for right turn (negative steering) starting around WP30-35",
    "Heading is ~5.3° and rising — car is turning left slightly to follow waypoints",
    "Waypoint target index = nearest_waypoints[1]+5 consistently used"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [6.019, 6.080, 6.137, 6.200, 6.242],
    "y": [0.643, 0.650, 0.657, 0.670, 0.677],
    "yaw": [0.712, 1.800, 2.716, 4.100, 5.269]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP27 at (7.010, 1.026): dy=0.349, dx=0.768, bearing=24.44°, delta=+19.17° → moderate left correction",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
